sql: SELECT author_count FROM articles ORDER BY author_count DESC;
SELECT author_count FROM articles ORDER BY author_count ASC;
SELECT author_count FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count DESC;
SELECT author_count FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count ASC;
SELECT author_count FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count DESC;
SELECT author_count FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count ASC;
SELECT author_count FROM articles GROUP BY author_count;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles ORDER BY author_count DESC;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles ORDER BY author_count ASC;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count DESC;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count ASC;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count DESC;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count ASC;
SELECT reference_count FROM articles GROUP BY reference_count;
SELECT article_title FROM articles ORDER BY author_count DESC;
SELECT article_title FROM articles ORDER BY author_count ASC;
SELECT article_title FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count DESC;
SELECT article_title FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count ASC;
SELECT article_title FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count DESC;
SELECT article_title FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count ASC;
SELECT title_word_count FROM articles ORDER BY author_count DESC;

SELECT title_word_count FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count DESC;
SELECT title_word_count FROM articles ORDER BY reference_count ASC;
SELECT title_word_count FROM articles ORDER BY title_word_count DESC;

SELECT title_word_count, COUNT(*) FROM articles GROUP BY title_word_count;
